title: Demo: File Review
description: A sample conversation where Claude reads and runs a Python file, then reviews a config.

title: Debugging: API 500 Errors
description: Watch a systematic debugging workflow — from symptom to root cause to fix, investigating a null-value bug in a profile update endpoint.

title: Creating Clawback
description: A complete context engineering session — from PRD to production. Watch the full build of this very application: 13 issues, 4 phases, live testing, bug fixes, and deployment.

title: Lab 05b: Build and Ship It (WTF MCP Server)
description: Complete implementation session — emergency fix for classifier hangs, producer-consumer refactor, quiescence mode design, live testing, code review, and merge. Watch the full build of a WTF MCP server feature from crisis to production.

title: Lab 05a: Design Your MCP Server
description: PRD writing and issue decomposition for the WTF MCP server quiescence mode feature. Watch the design phase before implementation.

title: Lab 04: Code Review
description: Learn the code review workflow — running the code-reviewer agent, understanding severity ratings, and fixing findings before commit.

title: Lab 03: Identity and Check-In
description: Agent identity setup and session onboarding — /name, Dev-Team, /engage workflow.

title: Lab 02: Your First Workflow
description: Complete workflow from issue creation to merge — branch, code, precheck, scp, MR, close.
